title: After Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's twice as big as Merry!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It has a big Gaff sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky, thanks. This is the best!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where's frankly!? I want to thank him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You mean, he wouldn't want to...?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky really likes being with you guys,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What are you doing back here?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Do I need a reason for that?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This is the frankly house!! My house.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: ... I'll stop with the chit-chat, bro....!!!
